name: foreca-fullstack-react
description: Foreca full-stack: frontend (React/Vite) + backend (Express) + ML. Mendukung run lokal sinkron (npm run dev) dan deploy fullstack di Vercel (frontend statis + backend sebagai serverless function di /api).

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n MOCK-ML,BACKEND,FRONTEND -c magenta,cyan,green "npm run dev:mockml" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: cross-env ML_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:7860 PORT=8080 npm --prefix backend run dev
scripts.dev:hf: concurrently -k -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c cyan,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.vercel-build: npm --prefix frontend install --include=dev && npm --prefix frontend run build
